description: Admin system implementation and design system centralization with shared UI package

changelog.description: Complete admin system with role-based access control for design system
Migrated design system to shared @finance-manager/ui package
Admin badge with shield icon and tooltip in navigation header
JWT tokens include admin role claim, AdminRoute component for protected routes
Added npm script shortcuts (pnpm start, stop, restart, etc.) for easier development
Comprehensive design system usage guide and Copilot instructions updates
